name: Generic WAF Baseline Planning Pack
objective: Provide a vendor-agnostic planning baseline that helps teams map minimum WAF controls before translating them into product-specific syntax.
risk_mitigated: Gaps caused by inconsistent baseline design across vendors, applications, and operating teams.
potential_side_effects: This planning pack is not directly deployable and must be translated into vendor-native rules before enforcement.
tuning_notes: Use it to drive workshops with AppSec, platform, and operations teams. Convert each baseline control into Cloudflare, AWS WAF, Azure WAF, or appliance-specific artifacts.
deployment_notes: Treat this pack as a control checklist and translation target, not as an executable policy. Review it before every new environment rollout.
monitoring_notes: Use the pack as a coverage checklist during quarterly reviews and compare it with deployed vendor-specific packs through waf-catalog.
generic_controls: Protect login, token, MFA, and password reset endpoints
Block common SQLi, XSS, SSRF, and path traversal payloads
Define exception ownership and monitoring before block mode
